title: limnanthemum orbiculatum
intro: Limnanthemum orbiculatum, also known as Blue Marsh Marigold, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Limnanthemum orbiculatum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health.
